headline: Efficiency techniques including hybrid strategy and quantization broke out across the month while enterprise Claude deployments deepened in finance.
body: Hybrid strategy and quantization both registered breakouts atop the technique movers, alongside rising momentum in system architecture and adaptive computation. A cluster of new technique entrants centered on application sandboxing surfaced, including Content Security Policy, sandboxed iframe, and app marketplace architecture, while Gaussian splatting and linear inverse problems entered on the modeling side. On the enterprise front, large banks moved Claude into production, with Anthropic hosting a financial services briefing on banking implementations, and NVIDIA published work on transaction foundation models for financial intelligence. France also moved off Palantir's AI tooling toward a domestic provider, and GitHub Models closed to new customers.

cited_items.title: France to ditch Palantir's AI data tools in favour of domestic provider
GitHub Models is no longer available to new customers
Build Your Own Transaction Foundation Model for Financial Intelligence
